title: The Middle
why_this_song: The Middle by Jimmy Eat World (2001) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 13 times; first heard in: "Try everything you can"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Everything, everything'll be just fine"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Everything, everything'll be alright, alright"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "When you're away"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Hey, don't write yourself off yet"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Little girl, you're in the middle of the ride
Hey, don't write yourself off yet
It's only in your head, you feel left out

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "everything" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "everything" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "everything'll" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "everything'll" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "The Middle" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "The Middle", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "The Middle" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "The Middle" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "The Middle", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "The Middle", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
